hero.headline: Certified spices, sourced at origin and stocked in Copenhagen.
hero.subhead: Bulk spices and herbs for professional kitchens, with full traceability and Copenhagen delivery.
hero.socialProof: Supplying bakeries, restaurants and food producers across Denmark.

direct.title: Sourced direct
direct.description: We buy at origin and import ourselves, so the chain from grower to your kitchen stays short. Fewer hands means fresher stock and pricing that holds.

certified.title: Documented quality
certified.description: Every batch is lab tested and arrives with a certificate of analysis on file. EU Organic and Fairtrade ranges are available where you need them.

reliable.title: Copenhagen logistics
reliable.description: We hold stock locally and ship from Copenhagen, so reorders arrive on a schedule you can plan around. Consistent supply, no surprises mid-week.

step1.title: Request an account
step1.description: Fill in the form below and tell us who you are.

step2.title: We set your pricing
step2.description: We configure pricing for your account based on your range and volume.

step3.title: Reorder online, anytime
step3.description: Place and repeat orders from any device, with your prices already in place.

categories.subtitle: Everything in stock — cleared and ready to deliver

q0.quote: The cardamom and cinnamon are consistent batch to batch, which matters when you're baking the same products every day. Reordering takes a minute and the delivery window holds.
q0.name: Lars Meyer

q1.quote: We get the origin documentation we need without having to chase anyone for it. The quality is where it should be, and supply has been steady through busy seasons.
q1.name: Anders Nicolajsen

q2.quote: Switching to Krydderi tightened our pricing and cut a step out of our supply chain. The certificates and lab results are on file, which makes our own audits straightforward.
q2.name: Sara Lindgren

lead.title: Request an account
lead.subtitle: Tell us about your business. We'll be in touch within one business day.
lead.message: Anything you'd like us to know? (optional)
lead.messagePlaceholder: A note about your business or what you're looking for.
lead.disclaimer: We reply within one business day · No commitment
lead.successBody: Thanks — we'll review your details and get back to you within one business day.

footer.tagline: Certified spices direct to the professional kitchen.
